title: The Plan Splits Across Dressrosa
description: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo, Fujitora, Marines, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11 as dressrosa’s toys and forgotten people reveal that Doflamingo’s rule has erased lives, memories, and families from the country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: sanji-dono, I must hurry to the "toy house" to rescue Kanjuro, that I must.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yeah, I want to too, but just hold on.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: There's an emergency situation here.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Just look how many Marines have surrounded the Colos- Seum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Somehow or other, pirates and criminals alike have entered this tournament with no trouble...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: So these guys have shown up to catch them, yeah?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Well it's only natural that crime- nails would be arrested, that it is.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Did you forget that you've also been riding on a pirate ship!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I want to somehow inform Luffy about the sit- nation, but...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: The fighters' entrance has been heavily blocked....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ehhh, still no one...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: There should already be hundreds of losers from a and B blocks!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Why hasn't even one of them emerged?!

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral Maynard Infil- Trated as a contestant, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's strange, huh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We haven't heard from him in a while...

dialogue.speaker: Fujitora
dialogue.text: Marine HeadQuar- TERS Vice Admiral: "Shark cutter"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Doing as he pleases, that brat...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Something must be happening... inside that col- Osseum...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Here in dress- Rosa...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Ever since Doflamingo took the throne, ten years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: There've been two heavily enforced laws....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The first is a curfew, at midnight. No one is permit- Ted outside after then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ehh!? Not even adults!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Humans return to their own houses,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And toys go to the "toy house".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nobody is out and about late at night...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Can't even go out drinking?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well the shops aren't open, at any rate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Second... Under no Circum- stances...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: May a toy enter a human resi- dance...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Or a human enter the "toy house".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What!? It looks like you all get along so well, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Even that sort of thing is forbid- Den...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: indeed...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well... is such a sad division between living organisms...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And man-made things so inevitable?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: But forget that!! I've already gotten used to it, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Just what exactly are you toys in the first place??

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You have will,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: And you can speak!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who's the vegapunk-level technician who produced you!?

summary: Pages 5–8 focus on the plan splits across dressrosa, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
